content: 一年多以来到诞墨出之前几乎没有闪退的情况，诞墨更新之后当天上线试用关卡闪退四五次，之后就是带诞墨帧率立刻降低，以及她开狂气爆发有约五分之一的时候会闪退，其他队伍也有小概率会闪退。前几天开周年活动后这个问题更严重了，打开活动界面、打开活动关卡，开大，打到一半都有概率闪退，甚至闪退回来之后已经打出的卡牌还在手牌上显示，甚至是最高图层，挡住部分别的手牌。今天我试图上线试了五六次，只要点开活动主页一定闪退。这个问题影响真的很严重，且不止我一个玩家有这个问题。至少我的设备我确认过没有内存和网络问题
Is auritas Skill info missing some information? Most clearly state that it's wod's and such items equipped on the character

So, I decided to use my Origin of Time on my +6 Celeste, which brings me to her Rewinding screen. However, once I try to click the button to remove Enlightenments, it said Celeste was in an Assignment, which was weird because I had just removed her to use the Origin on her.

Once I left the Rewind screen on Celeste, it disappeared from there, and I began searching, finding it on Nautila for some reason (who I don't have any intention of Rewinding).

Could I get the Rewind removed from Nautila and get it on Celeste, or anything similar? 

Thanks for the help and dedication! 

UID: 100897706
能不能开启碎裂余梦合成群星余梦的功能啊，大灵塑材料获取效率太低了

一年多以来到诞墨出之前几乎没有闪退的情况，诞墨更新之后当天上线试用关卡闪退四五次，之后就是带诞墨帧率立刻降低，以及她开狂气爆发有约五分之一的时候会闪退，其他队伍也有小概率会闪退。前几天开周年活动后这个问题更严重了，打开活动界面、打开活动关卡，开大，打到一半都有概率闪退，甚至闪退回来之后已经打出的卡牌还在手牌上显示，甚至是最高图层，挡住部分别的手牌。今天我试图上线试了五六次，只要点开活动主页一定闪退。这个问题影响真的很严重，且不止我一个玩家有这个问题。至少我的设备我确认过没有内存和网络问题

when trying to put the word "use" in my description it states illegal words are not allowed. Furthermore I tried to use Chinese (Simplified and Traditional) and the same thing happened. The sentence i tried to input was "please use my invite code : [my invite code numbers were inputted here]" . I wanted to do this in both Chinese and English since I have both global and CN followers.

Make an early Phase in Mission Report dedicated to forcing players to utilize realm mechanics. New players coming into the game very often don't learn about realm mechanics like Crimson Furnace or Tentacle stance switching until very later on, like chapter 8 of arc 1. This would incentivize players to look into the realms and actually learn about it instead of going through the entirety of arc 2 without realizing that red stance causes tentacles to attack with every damage instance. The quests could be:

1. Use Crimson Furnace to heal X HP
2. Switch tentacle stances to Tranquil Sea and Raging Waves
3. Use Raging Waves stance to trigger X tentacle attacks before the end of the turn
4. Use Annihilation to take X cards out of Ultra Space

thread_title: 将不会刷新的两种抽在售罄后从兑换商店移除
